LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-EAGLE_RE_ARM.descript: Shuffle all cards with [gold]ReArm[/gold] from your exhaust pile into your draw pile.

Shuffle 5 upgraded SEAF Artillery Shells into your draw pile.

LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-GRENADE_PISTOL.title: Grenade Pistol
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-GRENADE_PISTOL.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. The next [gold]Grenade[/gold] you play is free.
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-GRENADE_PISTOL.upgrad: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. The next [gold]Grenade[/gold] you play is free.

LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-ONE_TWO.title: One-Two
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-ONE_TWO.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The next 2 [gold]Grenades[/gold] you play are free.
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-ONE_TWO.upgraded_desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The next 2 [gold]Grenades[/gold] you play are free.
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-SHIELD_GRENADE.title: Shield Grenade
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-LURE_MINE.title: Lure Mine
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-GRENADE_LAUNCHER.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Grenades[/gold] into your hand. The next 3 [gold]Grenades[/gold] you play are free.
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-GRENADE_LAUNCHER.upgr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Grenades[/gold] into your hand. The next 3 [gold]Grenades[/gold] you play are free.
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-STUN_GRENADE.title: Stun Grenade
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-STUN_GRENADE.descript: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies. Draw 2 cards.
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-STUN_GRENADE.upgraded: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies. Draw 2 cards.

LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-WARP_PACK.title: Warp Pack
LIBERATE_THE_SPIRE-WARP_PACK.description: Gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose 5 HP and shuffle a [gold]Wound[/gold] into your draw pile.
